evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Contribute to internal data standards and documentation
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The only signals present lean toward rigour (data quality processing, standards, documentation) with no explicit velocity/speed language in the JD.
evidence.domain_risk: We help key players across the global air cargo and logistics industry make better commercial and strategic decisions.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Commercial and strategic decision support for logistics clients, but no financial reporting, regulatory, or compliance language present.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Design, implement, and manage data pipelines that ingest data from various sources
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A small ~50-person company with foundational infrastructure-building responsibilities and no named data sub-teams indicates an early-stage data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Strong proficiency in Python and SQL - you use these tools daily
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific ETL, tool, and stack details (Hadoop, Databricks, Apache Spark, daily Python/SQL usage) give a concrete picture of the role.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Translate business questions into data logic, ensuring products are tailored to client needs
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role is explicitly oriented around client decisions and commercial/strategic outcomes for logistics customers.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design, implement, and manage data pipelines that ingest data from various sources
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Designing and managing infrastructure is strategic-leaning, but framing around translating business questions and tailoring to client needs is more execution-oriented, giving mixed autonomy.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool or AI infrastructure mention appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: No testing, data quality framework, or data contract language appears anywhere in the extracted JD text.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The JD is framed entirely in delivery and capability terms with no risk or compliance register.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design, implement, and manage data pipelines that ingest data from various sources
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verbs (design, implement) at a small young company (founded 2022) indicate greenfield infrastructure building.
